name: Client Operating Model Phase 6 Virtual Lab State
outcome_goal: Produce the Virtual Lab authority and event-sourced state model implementation packet.
anti_requirements: Do not mix observed facts with predicted consequences.
Do not copy whole fake databases when event-sourced state is enough.

jobs.label: phase_06_virtual_lab_state_packet
jobs.prompt: Write artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_06_virtual_lab_state/PLAN.md. Produce a bounded build packet for Phase 6: Virtual Lab Authority and Event-Sourced State Model. Define virtual environment revisions, state seeds from Object Truth, copy-on-write object state, state events, causality, digests, receipts/events, CQRS ops, tests, and validation. Do not edit code.
